zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Affeton於1404年出生在英國英格蘭戴文韋斯特 沃林頓時，她的父親John De Affeton19歲，母親Joan Bratton19歲。她於大約1428年與Hugh Stucley在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年3月26日在英國戴文塔福斯托可享年63歲，埋葬在英國戴文塔福斯托可。

zh-hans.West Worlington, Devon, England: 英国戴文韋斯特 沃林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Affeton于1404年出生在英国英格兰戴文韋斯特 沃林頓时，她的父亲John De Affeton19岁，母亲Joan Bratton19岁。她于大约1428年与Hugh Stucley在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年3月26日在英国戴文塔福斯托可享年63岁，埋葬在英国戴文塔福斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Affeton was born in 1404, in West Worlington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John De Affeton, was 19 and her mother, Joan Bratton, was 19. She married Hugh Stucley about 1428, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 March 1467, in Tawstock, Devon, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Tawstock, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Affeton est née en 1404, à West Worlington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Affeton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan Bratton, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Stucley environ 1428, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 mars 1467, à Tawstock, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Tawstock, Devon, Angleterre.

de.Affeton, West Worlington, Devonshire, En: West Worlington, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Affeton 1404 in West Worlington, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Affeton 19 und ihre Mutter Joan Bratton 19. Sie hat um 1428 in Devon, England Hugh Stucley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. März 1467 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Tawstock, Devon, England und wurde in Tawstock, Devon, England begraben.

Lei sposato Hugh Stucley circa 1428, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 marzo 1467, nel Tawstock, Devon, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Tawstock, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Affetonが1404年にイギリスイギリスデボンウエスト ウオルリントンで生まれた時，父John De Affetonは19歳，母Joan Brattonは19歳であった。約1428年にイギリスデボンでHugh Stucleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年3月26日にイギリスデボンタウストックで63歳で死去し，イギリスデボンタウストックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Affeton(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨스트 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Affeton(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bratton(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1428년 영국 데폰에서 Hugh Stucley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 3월 26일 영국 데폰 타w스톡에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 타w스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Affeton nasceu em 1404, em West Worlington, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Affeton, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bratton, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Stucley aproximadamente 1428, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de março de 1467, em Tawstock, Devon, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Tawstock, Devon, Inglaterra.

ro.Affeton, West Worlington, Devonshire, En: West Worlington, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Affeton родилась в 1404 г. в местности вест ворлингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John De Affeton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bratton, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Stucley около 1428 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 марта 1467 г. в местности тавстокк, девон, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности тавстокк, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Affeton nació en 1404, en West Worlington, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John De Affeton, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Joan Bratton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Hugh Stucley aproximadamente 1428, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1467, en Tawstock, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Tawstock, Devon, Inglaterra.
